mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(A.BBS_ID) FROM TB_BBS_USE A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BBS_MASTER E ON A.BBS_ID = E.BBS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE B ON B.CODE = A.REGIST_SE_CODE WHERE B.CODE_ID = 'COM001' AND A.REGIST_SE_CODE != 'REGC07'
AND E.BBS_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWrd} || '%'

SELECT A.BBS_ID , E.BBS_NM , A.TRGET_ID , A.REGIST_SE_CODE , B.CODE_NM AS REGIST_SE_CODE_NM , A.USE_AT , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID , A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , 'NOUSE' CMMNTY_ID , 'NOUSE' CMMNTY_NM , 'NOUSE' CLB_ID , 'NOUSE' CLB_NM , 'NOUSE' BBS_TY_CODE FROM TB_BBS_USE A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BBS_MASTER E ON A.BBS_ID = E.BBS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE B ON B.CODE = A.REGIST_SE_CODE WHERE B.CODE_ID = 'COM001' AND A.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A.TRGET_ID = #{trgetId}

SELECT COUNT(TT.BBS_ID) FROM ( SELECT A.BBS_ID , D.USER_NM FROM TB_BBS_USE A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BBS_MASTER B ON A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE C ON C.CODE = A.REGIST_SE_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN VW_USER_MASTER D ON A.TRGET_ID = D.ESNTL_ID WHERE A.BBS_ID IN ( SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_BBS_USE WHERE TRGET_ID = #{trgetId} AND USE_AT = 'Y' ) AND A.REGIST_SE_CODE = 'REGC07' UNION ALL SELECT A.BBS_ID , '[전체]' USER_NM FROM TB_BBS_USE A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BBS_MASTER B ON A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE C ON C.CODE = A.REGIST_SE_CODE WHERE A.BBS_ID IN ( SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_BBS_USE WHERE TRGET_ID = #{trgetId} ) AND A.REGIST_SE_CODE IN ('REGC05', 'REGC06') UNION ALL SELECT A.BBS_ID , '' AS USER_NM FROM TB_BBS_USE A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BBS_MASTER B ON A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE C ON C.CODE = A.REGIST_SE_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMNTY_USER E ON E.CMMNTY_ID = #{trgetId} LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CLUB_USER F ON F.CLB_ID = #{trgetId} LEFT OUTER JOIN VW_USER_MASTER G ON E.EMPLYR_ID = G.ESNTL_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN VW_USER_MASTER H ON F.EMPLYR_ID = H.ESNTL_ID WHERE A.BBS_ID IN ( SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_BBS_USE WHERE TRGET_ID = #{trgetId} AND USE_AT = 'Y' ) AND A.REGIST_SE_CODE IN ('REGC05', 'REGC06') AND ( (A.BBS_ID, E.EMPLYR_ID) NOT IN (SELECT BBS_ID, TRGET_ID FROM TB_BBS_USE) OR (A.BBS_ID, F.EMPLYR_ID) NOT IN (SELECT BBS_ID, TRGET_ID FROM TB_BBS_USE) ) ) TT
WHERE TT.USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWrd} || '%'
